issues.detail: The skill does not address error handling or edge cases such as Docker failures or mapping errors.

scenarios.name: Stateful order lifecycle mock
scenarios.rationale: Treatment used WireMock's documented scenarioName/requiredScenarioState/newScenarioState fields with the exact lifecycle transitions; baseline used generic conditional logic with no concept of scenario state.

scenarios.name: Record real API for offline replay
scenarios.rationale: Treatment invoked the documented --proxy-all and --record-mappings Docker flags producing reusable JSON mappings; baseline suggested a hand-rolled proxy that does not produce WireMock stubs.
